product: EventBridge support will soon be available for file events provided queues
tagline: In late February 2026, EventBridge support will be available for file events provided queues for S3 locations.
what_it_does: In late February 2026, EventBridge support will be available for file events provided queues for S3 locations. Currently, file events can only be set up using SNS or by routing storage events directly to SQS. This page describes how to list, view, update, grant permissions on, manage file events for, and delete external locations.
why_it_matters: note Databricks recommends governing file access using volumes.
key_takeaway: In late February 2026, EventBridge support will be available for file events provided queues for S3 locations.
